summary: Admin-mediated password reset (iteration_14) fully verified end-to-end. Backend 16/16 NEW pytest passed (test_password_reset.py) covering /auth/forgot-password (no enumeration, duplicate dedupe, empty ID 400), /admin/password-reset-requests listing (admin + supervisor 200, status filter), admin reset (supervisor 403, admin 200 + temp pw 12 chars, second reset 400, missing 404), officer temp-pw login (must_change_password=true), /auth/change-password (wrong current 401, short new 400, success clears flag, subsequent login must_change_password=false), admin reject (supervisor 403, admin 200, second reject 400). Regression: test_rbac.py (46 tests) + test_triple_fusion_queue.py (9 tests) = 55/55 passed. Frontend: ForgotPasswordModal (forgot-officer-id-input / forgot-password-submit-btn) submits and shows 'Request submitted' success state with 'Back to Login' button. ForceChangePasswordModal (force-change-password-modal + cpw-current/new/confirm/submit testids) BLOCKS TEST002 at /login until submitted; after submit routes to /, and subsequent login returns must_change_password=false. Admin (pc72) Admin Dashboard shows 'Password Resets' tab with count badge (2), Reset + reject buttons, temp-password-banner + temp-password-value (len=12) + copy + dismiss work. Supervisor (DEMO001) Supervisor Dashboard has same Password Resets tab (count=1 after completion) but rows show 'Admin only' lock text and 0 approve/reject buttons (confirmed visually + via selector count).
critical_code_review_comments: Security: /auth/forgot-password correctly returns identical generic message for existing+unknown officer IDs; no enumeration leak. Confirmed status_code=200 for NOSUCHOFFICER_ZZ999.
Deduplication: pending-request uniqueness is enforced (duplicate for same officer_id returns 'already pending' without inserting a second row). Verified by pre/post count diff.
Token format: admin reset uses secrets.token_urlsafe(9)[:12] — 12 URL-safe chars, more than sufficient entropy for a one-time temp password.
Temp password is returned ONCE in POST /reset response body, never persisted; only bcrypt hash is stored. No copy of the plaintext exists server-side.
must_change_password flag correctly gates the force-change modal on the frontend; localStorage 'officer_password' is updated after change-password so api.js auto-refresh keeps working.
RBAC: verify_admin_or_supervisor on GET list, verify_admin on POST reset/reject. Supervisor 403 on both write endpoints verified.
Idempotency: second reset on completed request returns 400 (not 500 or duplicate token). Same for reject.
Audit trail: log_action is called on every state transition (request created, approved, rejected) with officer_id + request_id correlation — good for forensic review.
Minor: ForceChangePasswordModal does not validate new==confirm on backend (client-only check). If confirm field is bypassed via direct API, any new_password≥8 chars works — low risk but worth noting.
Minor: TEST002's initial temp_password POST may race with the officer.password_reset_at timestamp being ISO string; consistent with other timestamps in the codebase.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (4/4 flows verified: ForgotPasswordModal, ForceChangePasswordModal, Admin temp-password banner, Supervisor lock text)

test_credentials: pc72/Test123! (admin), DEMO001/Test123! (supervisor), TEST002/NewStrongPass!2026 (officer — password rotated during this run by UI force-change flow; pytest teardown resets back to Test123!).
seed_data_creation: During admin-reset UI test, two fresh pending reset requests were created (TEST002 via API seeding, pc72 leftover from a prior screenshot test). The TEST002 request was completed; the pc72 request remains pending — safe to leave or main agent can clean up via admin Reject button.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Password reset flow is production-ready. test_password_reset.py is idempotent (module-scoped fixture resets TEST002's password_hash to Test123! and clears password_reset_requests for TEST002 both at setup and teardown) — safe to re-run. Admin approve requires a window.confirm() dialog; Playwright must register page.on('dialog', lambda d: d.accept()). Correct testids: forgot-officer-id-input, forgot-password-submit-btn (NOT fpw-*); cpw-current-input, cpw-new-input, cpw-confirm-input, cpw-submit-btn, force-change-password-modal; temp-password-banner, temp-password-value, tab-resets, approve-reset-{request_id}, reject-reset-{request_id}.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs reproduced. All 11 requested test cases (7 backend + 4 frontend flows) pass.
